texto: Language is power that gets abused all the time, Robin, but we've got real enemies out there somewhere and until they're out of the picture, I won't get knotted up over people who don't get all the words right. It's a waste of energy.
explicacao: Citação de Tim Eldred sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Language is power that gets abused all the time, Robin, but we've got real enemies out there some…” articula tempo, bigotry, language em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como language.
